creator: andre@rikkertdekoe.nl
text:
hi bug-followup admins,


I have questions about this port I recently created:

- I supposed that the sender also would become port maintainer : I like 
it, I'm interested and I think I'm qualified.

However, wen@FreeBSD.org is defined as port maintainer in the Makefile.

- I tested the port, according to the "porters handbook". I also tested 
that joomla25 could be installed next to former versions (1.* .* 
branch). Easy, just by choosing other install directories and databasenames.

In the current (checked out) Makefile I see that the Makefile considers 
joomla-1.*.* conflicting with joomla25.

Why is that ? Didn't I read the documentation well enough ? Please let 
me know how to become port-maintainer and correct this and let me know 
if bug-followup@FreeBSD.org is not the right list to ask such questions.


Thanks
Andre Rikkert de Koe.
